yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_Dark_Web_Intercept_Telegram_RaaS_Syndica {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Dark Web Intercept: Telegram_RaaS_Syndicate - Potential Threat Activity"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-03-08"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-SWARM-AI" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Iranlinked_hackers_target_IP_cameras_acr {

        severity = "critical"

    strings:

        $kw0 = "RecoverPoint" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-30863 - Parse Server: JWT audience validation bypas"; content:"CVE-2026-30863"; nocase; sid:4306869; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-3714 - OpenCart Incomplete Fix CVE-2024-36694 templ"; content:"CVE-2026-3714"; nocase; sid:2789900; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
